articles.title: Vertu wants CEOs to run companies from an AI foldable starting at $6,880
articles.description: Built on top of the open-source Hermes project, Vertu's new foldable combines AI-agent workflows, enterprise integrations, and ultra-premium luxury
articles.author: Jagmeet Singh

articles.title: Google engineer charged with insider trading after making $1.2M on Polymarket
articles.description: According to the complaint, a Google engineer risked over $2.7 million on wagers related to Google's 2025 Year in Search campaign.
articles.author: Amanda Silberling

articles.title: Why Google’s AI can’t spell Google (or anything else)
articles.author: Amanda Silberling
